name: Dios Fastigheter AB (publ)
summary: Di√É¬∂s Fastigheter AB (publ) develops, owns, and rents commercial and residential properties in Sweden. It holds a portfolio of 333 properties and a lettable area of 1,483,000 sq.m with meeting places, shops, offices, and homes. The company was founded in 1921 and is headquartered in Ostersund, Sweden.
